title: Boy, the Noszty
writer: Imre Harmath, Zsolt Harsányi, Kálmán Mikszáth
actors: Pál Jávor, Éva Szörényi, Erika von Thellmann
plot: The wasteful Ferenc Noszty gets into serious trouble when even his family can't help him pay back his debts. There seems to be no other way, so they find him a rich girl to marry.
